channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Hut 8 Shares Hit All-Time High Price as Bitcoin Miner Signs $9.8 Billion AI Data Center Lease
item.description: Hut 8’s second hyperscale AI campus lease deal covers the first phase of a sprawling Nueces County complex that was originally meant to fuel Bitcoin mining.

item.title: NYSE tokenization partners warn synthetic stock tokens could mislead retail traders
item.description: Offshore synthetic tokens may not represent the underlying equity, use company names without approval, and exploit regulatory arbitrage.

item.title: Apple Agrees to $250 Million Settlement Over AI Claims—Here's Who Can Get Paid
item.description: Tech giant Apple has agreed to pay $250 million to settle claims it misled consumers about its AI system's capabilities.

item.title: OpenTrade raises $17M as CEO sees stablecoin yield tailwinds
item.description: OpenTrade raised $17 million to expand its stablecoin yield platform, bringing total funding above $30 million as it scales stablecoin yield infrastructure for global clients.

item.title: Why stablecoins and SWIFT may have to coexist
item.description: Remittance firms are using crypto to bypass parts of traditional settlement infrastructure, but this does not mean SWIFT is disappearing.

item.title: Samsung SDS wins deal to build South Korea’s blockchain securities system: Report
item.description: The Korea Securities Depository platform is expected to go live by February 2027, aligning with South Korea’s incoming security token framework.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Index jumps 2.5%, continuing higher
item.description: Near Protocol (NEAR) surged 16% and Internet Computer (ICP) gained 10.4%, leading index higher.

item.title: Zcash price may hit $800 as $2.7B hedge fund reveals ‘significant position’ in ZEC
item.description: Robinhood’s ZEC listing, easing US–Iran tensions and a shrinking liquid supply of tokens are further strengthening the bullish outlook for Zcash in the coming weeks.

item.title: OpenTrade raises $17 million to connect stablecoins to real-world assets
item.description: The a16z-backed stablecoin yield and RWA lending platform’s funding round was led by Mercury Fund and Notion Capital.

item.title: Memecoin trades carry rare 'seven-leg' parlay odds, BONK's Nom says at Consensus
item.description: The BONK core contributor argued memecoins skipping ETF and public-company rails end up rinsing retail.

item.title: LAS VEGAS, May 6, 2026 — CleanSpark, Inc. (Nasdaq: CLSK) (“CleanSpark” or the “Company”), today released its unaudited Bitcoin mining and operations update for the month ended April 30, 2026.“April was another strong month that reinforced our confide - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE5GSXpNM0FGMDEwdWJwaTZVWXQ4SS1udjJfNmpTSk5NOWRaLXlaVExRblgtZV9rNS12Y2xkb2FVd2ppVnpHQU5DbnFlUmlQa2xib3c1UUxfYmRrQWxxS210Wjc5b194UQ?oc=5" target="_blank">LAS VEGAS, May 6, 2026 — Cle…

item.title: Morning Minute: Crypto Majors Rally, Oil Falls on Renewed Peace Hopes
item.description: Oil is down 14% and broader markets are soaring. Coinbase is cutting 14% of its workforce. And is Michael Saylor going to finally sell some Bitcoin?

item.title: Colombia wants to mine bitcoin with surplus renewable energy
item.description: President Gustavo Petro said Colombia's Caribbean coast could host bitcoin mining facilities powered by surplus renewable energy, following a path similar to Paraguay.

item.title: Zcash bets turn into second-largest liquidations behind bitcoin as ZEC rockets 30%
item.description: The privacy coin extended its multi-month rally on Tuesday with $46.7 million in shorts liquidated, after Multicoin Capital disclosed a significant ZEC position.

item.title: Bubblemaps flags MYSTERY token over 90-wallet launch sniping cluster
item.description: Bubblemaps said it identified a large wallet cluster that accumulated 90% of the Mystery token’s supply at launch, raising concerns around the token’s distribution.

item.title: Morgan Stanley brings crypto trading with lower fees than rivals
item.description: The bank is rolling out crypto trading on E*Trade with lower fees than Coinbase, Robinhood and Schwab, according to Bloomberg.

item.title: Bitcoin Jumps to Three-Month High Above $82K on Report of US-Iran Agreement
item.description: Bitcoin's jumped as WTI crude fell 10%, on reports that the U.S. has prepared a on-page memorandum of understanding to end the war in Iran.

item.title: Linea contributes ZK rollup stack to Linux Foundation open-source group
item.description: Linea Consortium board director Declan Fox said the move gives its technology a neutral, foundation-governed home.

item.title: Bullish’s Equiniti deal could remake it into a tokenization powerhouse, Clear Street says
item.description: Compass Point took a more cautious stance, reiterating a Neutral rating and $36 target, saying much of the expected growth is already priced in, though it acknowledged potential upside.

item.title: JUST IN: $2 trillion Morgan Stanley launches crypto trading on its E*Trade platform. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9vSnczSEotb0xERHN5S3hGWXpNNjFKYmM3OHZfcmlBWURSQV9yNzhPem9ldmJUMWFGYUVMbEhVYXBncWR2RkVUVy1yTExMMGwyb29qY0QzZHBLaE1ucHJVR2tn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $2 trillion Morgan Stanle…

item.title: Bitcoin short-term holder cost basis eyes $92K as next price target
item.description: Bitcoin’s onchain data suggests that the upside may not be over for BTC price, but resistance at $84,000 could delay the recovery.

item.title: Zcash Leads Privacy Coin Surge With 37% Gains on MultiCoin Investment
item.description: MultiCoin Capital disclosed a significant ZEC position, citing wealth seizure risks as a catalyst for private assets.

item.title: Coinbase faces lawsuit over frozen funds from $55M crypto theft
item.description: The plaintiff says Coinbase froze traceable assets from a 2024 DAI phishing theft but refused to return them without a court order.

item.title: Where to Build: A Data-Driven Guide to Blockchain Infrastructure for TradFi Tokenization
item.description: This blog is a preview of our forthcoming report, “The New Rails: How Digital Assets Are Reshaping the Foundations of… The post Where to Build: A Data-Driven Guide to Blockchain Infrastructure for TradFi Tokenization appeared first on Chai…

item.title: CME Group to launch regulated Bitcoin volatility futures
item.description: CME to launch CFTC‑regulated Bitcoin Volatility futures in June, giving institutions an onshore way to trade implied BTC volatility.

item.title: DeFi's stress test ends quietly. Nothing broke.
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 6, 2026

item.title: From 'what' to 'how': Robinhood and Bitstamp say banks are ready to build on-chain
item.description: Executives from Ondo, Robinhood and Babylon Labs said at Consensus Miami 2026 that banks and traditional finance firms are embracing crypto infrastructure, though institutional adoption remains constrained.

item.title: Bitcoin can crash to $50K if 'most critical' bear market test fails: Analysis
item.description: Bitcoin price analysis saw $84,000 as bulls' "most critical" reclaim target as the risk of new $50,000 lows returned to the radar.

item.title: Strategy Mulls Selling Bitcoin to 'Inoculate the Market': Saylor
item.description: The largest corporate Bitcoin holder is reconsidering its “never sell” stance, with analysts weighing the ripple effects.

item.title: Multicoin goes big on zcash as privacy trade returns
item.description: The purchase marks a shift from Multicoin’s 2019 view, as ZEC has surged over 1,500% in the last year.

item.title: World’s first live map of token concentration: InsightX launches Atlas Live
item.description: A new era of on-chain trading transparency. Atlas Live enables traders to analyze token concentration and spot potential rug pulls. Now in real time.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs add nearly $1B as BTC surges past $80K in multi-day rally
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs posted $999 million in inflows over two trading days as Bitcoin moved back above $80,000.

item.title: Bitcoin moves above $82,000 while ZEC and DASH post double-digit rallies
item.description: BTC climbed above $82,00 as a weaker dollar lifted crypto markets, while privacy coins and AI-linked tokens led an altcoin rally.

item.title: OKX Card data shows crypto is paying for everyday life in Europe
item.description: OKX Card data shows most crypto spending in Europe is on groceries and dining, signaling growing everyday use over luxury purchases.

item.title: Bitcoin approaches $82,000 as oil crashes 6% on fresh Iran peace deal hopes
item.description: Bitcoin climbed toward $82,000 alongside a more than 1% rise in Nasdaq futures amid reports of progress toward a U.S.–Iran memorandum of understanding.

item.title: Blockchain.com launches SnapMarkets as prediction markets move into faster crypto bets
item.description: The launch occurs as prediction markets surge, facing regulatory conflicts between the pro-market CFTC and challenging state gambling authorities.

item.title: OKX joins crypto’s pre-IPO frenzy with OpenAI, SpaceX perpetual futures
item.description: Crypto exchanges are increasingly competing to offer retail traders exposure to Silicon Valley’s most valuable private firms, despite the products conferring neither equity ownership nor shareholder rights.

item.title: Beyond humans: Lily Liu says Solana is building the payment rails for the 'AI machine economy'
item.description: At Consensus Miami 2026, Solana Foundation President Lily Liu argued that stablecoin adoption by firms like Western Union validates Solana’s role as financial infrastructure for both human and machine economies.

item.title: Bitcoin's price rally has a hidden rhythm. Here are the hours and days driving gains.
item.description: Bitcoin’s three-month rally shows a clear internal structure than most traders might expect, with performance clustering around specific trading windows across global sessions.

item.title: Crypto custodian Taurus moves straight into EU capital markets with MiFID license in Cyprus
item.description: The license allows the firm to offer tokenized financial instruments to EU banks as well as secondary trading for tokenized bonds, fund shares, equities, and structured products.

item.title: Law enforcement freezes $41M connected to $150M crypto Ponzi collapse
item.description: BG Wealth Sharing, according to authorities, claimed to provide guidance on crypto trading, advertised heavily on social media and offered “daily profit opportunities.”

item.title: A16z raises $2.2B for new fund backing stablecoins, prediction markets
item.description: Andreessen Horowitz’s crypto investment arm said its new fund would seek to back projects that “people keep using when the hype fades.”

item.title: Crypto derivatives have converged with Wall Street. Equity perps could soon prove it.
item.description: Crypto and traditional finance are converging fast, with perpetual futures emerging as the strongest bridge between the two.

item.title: Anchorage launches agentic banking as CEO tips ‘trillion-dollar’ opportunity
item.description: Anchorage’s new product enables AI agents to have compliant access to capital across traditional finance and crypto payment rails.

item.title: Colombian president says Bitcoin mining could transform country's Caribbean coast
item.description: The Colombian president pointed to the impact Bitcoin mining has had in Paraguay, which is now the fourth-largest Bitcoin mining country by hashrate.

item.title: North Korea terror victims escalate fight to seize $71 million from Aave hack
item.description: In a 30-page response filed Tuesday, attorneys for victims of three North Korea terrorism cases reframed the April 18 Aave hack as fraud rather than theft — a distinction that could give the attackers legal title to the borrowed crypto.

item.title: Kelp DAO to migrate rsETH to Chainlink CCIP as blame game continues
item.description: Bryan Pellegrino, co-founder and CEO of LayerZero, disputed Kelp DAO’s accusations and said a postmortem by external security firms will be published soon.

item.title: Iggy Azalea faces class lawsuit over MOTHER memecoin
item.description: A class-action group has accused rapper Iggy Azalea of not following through on delivering utility and business integrations for her memecoin, Mother Iggy.

item.title: Strategy could sell Bitcoin ‘to inoculate the market,’ Michael Saylor says
item.description: It marks the first time that Saylor’s company has floated the idea of selling Bitcoin, parting ways with his long-held view that Bitcoin shouldn’t be sold.

item.title: BOMERS RETIREMENT DISASTER: In 1974 I saw the coming of the Baby Boomer Retirement Disaster. In 2026 millions of Boomers will be out of work in trouble financially….many homeless. I wrote two books for the Boomers and their families who wanted to - x.com

item.title: 🚨 NOW: Michael Saylor says, “We’ll probably sell some Bitcoin to fund a dividend.” “Just to inoculate the market, just to send a message that we did it.” - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9tMlRNTU0wT0NyeUh5TnFZckxqc0I3dTZZRXhHRGEzLXo4OVlKM05lSWxJLXYyREhrX2JvcWVlRXIzRUR3ZGdIZHR0M2Q1X2M3RDgwOWV5aHhQQ3FxWmhmUjB4SEc?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 NOW: Michael Saylor says, “W…

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor proposes selling Bitcoin to fund Strategy's dividends. 48% chance Strategy sells any Bitcoin this year. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE9WZ05zZTZQbWhiRjU4QnRicmd0cnZXWEsxM3c3RnByQUNhdXFRdTJNWDBBZXJfVDl3ajJheFZ5cHBMTDBFNGk3el9ZUDNQLUo0dHFOWlpFa2VZeGpVd2Z6cg?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor proposes sel…

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor's Strategy proposes selling some Bitcoin to pay dividends. "You buy Bitcoin with credit, you let it appreciate, and then you sell Bitcoin to pay the dividend." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFB6YU5zc29WQjl4RWM1bTJPSVhXcWtRZThPN0xHMlg2NTU2dDRWVVk2ZUNKallOaGl6MDV5bmVtUDNUa2V2TElfTDg5aFg3WHNoQ3BQaE1vTG5xMHZKMVFGT2xR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor's Strategy…

item.title: Kelp Blames LayerZero for $292 Million Hack, Plans Switch to Chainlink
item.description: The protocol shift comes as a $71 million court fight continues to unfold.

item.title: CME Gearing Up to Launch Bitcoin Volatility Futures Independent From BTC’s Price
item.description: CME's upcoming futures product will track whether the market thinks the price of Bitcoin is about to swing wildly or stay steady.

item.title: 'Moment of Danger': Anthropic CEO Warns of Cyber Risk Window as AI Uncovers Software Flaws
item.description: Experts warn that AI is exposing software bugs at scale, raising the risk of faster cyberattacks.

item.title: How Solana Exchange Drift Plans to Repay Users After $295 Million Crypto Hack
item.description: Solana's Drift Protocol says most of the stolen funds linked to North Korean hackers remain traceable—and it has a plan to make victims whole.

item.title: A Blues-Singing AI Frog Is Taking Over TikTok Brazil
item.description: AI native memes, meet AI-generated frogs and classic Brazilian nursery rhymes.

item.title: Strategy Posts $12.5 Billion Q1 Loss as Bitcoin Slump Hammers Massive Holdings
item.description: Michael Saylor’s Strategy continues to bet big on Bitcoin even as falling prices deliver a punishing quarter for the treasury giant.

item.title: During crashes: - #Altcoins go down first. - #Bitcoin follows. - Nasdaq comes after that. We've had that part. Now, oil is peaking, Gold has peaked. The volatility goes down on Gold, means that the risk of holding that asset is decreased. That means that allocator - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5XSzdNLU0zUEQzUVUxb1ptNW9zNm1wR1d0dHZXYkxjUGUzWjRuYzZJZUNIeXZ1VkNLekNTX3JGUF9yRjkxeDJ3OEpUcU9DQW5obk9IM09QWjdEZ1RUb1RGUjdJMA?oc=5" target="_blank">During crashes: - #Altcoins go d…
